title: WAGO GmbH & Co. KG Industrial Managed Switches

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - WAGO GmbH & Co. KG Industrial Managed Switches
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/04/01
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*certvde.com*'
            - '*wago.csaf-tp.certvde.com*'
            - '*www.wago.com*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
